# Esker — Premium short stays in Islamabad & Rawalpindi

> Esker is an AI-first booking platform for premium, professionally managed short-stay apartments, penthouses and villas in Islamabad and Rawalpindi, Pakistan. Guests describe what they want — in English or Roman Urdu — to an AI concierge (by text or voice) and book a verified stay in minutes. "Esker Exclusive" listings are inspected and managed to a guaranteed standard.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://eskerrentals.com/): AI concierge + featured stays.
- [Browse all stays](https://eskerrentals.com/stays): full live inventory; supports natural-language search at /stays?q=YOUR+REQUEST.
- [Esker Exclusive](https://eskerrentals.com/stays?tier=exclusive): professionally managed, guaranteed-quality listings.

## How booking works
- Find a place (browse or ask the concierge), pick dates, and reserve.
- Pay an advance to secure it — 25% for standard stays, 50% for Esker Exclusive — by Easypaisa, JazzCash, bank transfer, or SadaPay; the balance is paid at check-in.
- First-time guests verify identity with a CNIC or passport. The team confirms the booking after verifying payment.

## Policies
- [Cancellation & Refund](https://eskerrentals.com/legal/cancellation)
- [Terms of Service](https://eskerrentals.com/legal/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://eskerrentals.com/legal/privacy)
